title: tecno-consultores/Revolucion-Open-Source-Creando-Flujos-de-Inteligencia-Artificial-100-Locales
summary: En un ecosistema tecnológico dominado por servicios en la nube de pago, esta ponencia demuestra cómo recuperar el control total sobre la Inteligencia Artificial. (Presentacion para el 50 aniversario del IMYCA UC)

title: kidshadow79/Ogma
summary: Assistant IA à mémoire persistante et croissance organique

title: azerozero/grob
summary: LLM proxy with built-in DLP and regulatory compliance. Redacts secrets before they reach the API. EU AI Act, GDPR, HDS/PCI DSS ready. Multi-provider failover, live TUI, virtual keys, fan-out. 6 MB, zero deps. Rust.

title: jmsboswell67-alt/dc-controls-flashcards
summary: Open-source flashcards (~340 cards) for BMS / data center controls technician interviews. Single HTML file. Optional local-LLM grading via Ollama.

title: AlexanderPolozhnov/careerpilot-ai
summary: CareerPilot AI — полномасштабная платформа управления поиском работы с анализом вакансий с помощью искусственного интеллекта, отслеживанием приложений, напоминаниями и аналитикой. Статус: В активном развитии.

title: lelabdev/rag-ferrite
summary: Personal RAG engine — simple, fast, Rust. One binary (15 MB), one DB, native collections. MCP-native.

title: mathurshubh/llm-runtime-security-gateway
summary: AI runtime security gateway for detecting prompt injection and jailbreak attacks in LLM applications.

title: nkalogirou/Thesis
summary: Comparative evaluation of RAG retrieval strategies using Haystack, Milvus, and Ollama on a synthetic enterprise corpus

title: Glad-Labs/poindexter
summary: Poindexter — open-source AI content pipeline that researches, writes, reviews, and publishes autonomously. Self-hosted on your machine. Built by Glad Labs LLC.

title: mshin77/TextAnalysisR
summary: TextAnalysisR: A text mining workflow tool (R package version 0.1.4)

title: biagio-scaglia/hatsune-assistant
summary: Coding assistant in Flutter con presenza 3D di Hatsune Miku, design pulito e base scalabile per integrazione Ollama.

title: miclaldogan/bantzv2
summary: Bantz won't be a helper; he will be your Host. Your computer will become his studio, and your tasks will give the "entertainment." He won't just execute code; he will "pull strings" behind the scenes with a smile that you can hear through the text.

title: jcviau81/voxyflow
summary: The AI assistant that remembers your project and ships your backlog — without locking you in. Converse and execute directly in your Kanban board. Voice-first, multi-provider, self-hosted.

title: Ahkeratmehilaiset/waggledance-swarm
summary: Local-first AI runtime that routes 10k+ solver descriptors at warm p99 0.05 ms (1000/1000 hits, zero fallback) and spawns 1004 live agent clones in 120 s. Hex-mesh routing, MAGMA-audited provenance, agent-bridge autonomy fabric. Profile S (fully offline) or Profile L (opt-in cloud). BUSL.

title: Cerid-AI/cerid-ai
summary: Self-hosted, privacy-first Personal AI Knowledge Companion with RAG-powered retrieval, intelligent agents, and extensible SDK

title: psfr4590-afk/ANARCHY
summary: Fully local AI shell — no cloud, no API keys. Ollama + GGUF + RAG + voice + scheduler. Windows, macOS, Linux, Chromebook, Android.

title: Crownelius/ventipus
summary: Terminal AI coding CLI for any OpenAI-compatible API (OpenRouter, OpenAI, NVIDIA, Ollama, LM Studio, DeepSeek). Modes, slash commands, multi-agent swarming, key-rotation pool, optional voice + screen-reader, sandbox + permission gates.

title: RicherTunes/Brainarr
summary: Local AI Music Discovery for Lidarr - Brainarr is a privacy-focused AI-powered import list plugin for Lidarr that generates intelligent music recommendations using local AI models. It exclusively supports local providers (Ollama, LM Studio) to ensure your music preferences never leave your network.

title: Nicholas-Kloster/aimap
summary: AI infrastructure scanner: 120 fingerprints + 50 deep enumerators for LLM runtimes, vector databases, ML model servers, agent platforms, observability stacks, AI safety/guardrails, medical AI, and voice/audio AI. Defender + research tool. Single Go binary, read-only HTTP probes.

title: adrianwedd/spark
summary: SPARK — a Claude-powered robot companion for a neurodivergent kid. Built on SunFounder PiCar-X + Raspberry Pi.
